MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-29-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LEGALMATCH.COM'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: Julie A. Marquis, Esq., 415-765-9100, Law Offices of Julie A. Marquis for Plaintiff and Opposing Party; Ken Lamance, Esq., 415-946-0884 of Legal Match for Defendant and Moving Party.
RULING: Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling. DENY - FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN. SHOULD SEEK RELIEF IN TEXAS COURT. Prevailing party to prepare order and comply with CRC 391. (302/REQ/JT). Reporter: Lisa Sarto, CSR # 8994
